title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: redhat-release bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for redhat-release is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The redhat-release package contains licensing information regarding, and identifies the installed version of, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.1][redhat-release] Change Requires: rpm to Conflicts: (JIRA:RHELBLD-17548)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for redhat-release is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The redhat-release package contains licensing information regarding, and identifies the installed version of, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.1][redhat-release] Change Requires: rpm to Conflicts: (JIRA:RHELBLD-17548)
